title: Automatically reference all tipper axes from the HMI
summary: Use the operator station HMI controls to automatically reference all tipper axes, confirm completion by verifying the reference status indicators show green "R" icons, then return the system to AUTO and restart operation.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when tipper axes need to be automatically referenced from the HMI and the system must be returned to operation after referencing completes.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to return the system to AUTO or press CYCLE START before referencing is completed and the "R" icons have turned green.

Do not use this procedure as a substitute for re-commissioning after any part is replaced; the surrounding maintenance note states that a tipper needs to be re-commissioned after any part is replaced.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the HMI-based axis referencing sequence, verify completion using the "R" status indicators, and return the system to AUTO and CYCLE START only after referencing is complete.

safety_notes: Do not continue to AUTO and CYCLE START until referencing is completed and the "R" icons have turned green.
The surrounding maintenance note states that a tipper needs to be re-commissioned after any part is replaced.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the HMI or operator controls with RESET, AUTO REF, AUTO, and CYCLE START
Ability to observe the 'R' status icons during referencing

access_required: Access to the HMI or operator controls with RESET, AUTO REF, AUTO, and CYCLE START
system_preconditions: Tipper axes require referencing before returning the system to operation.
The operator must be able to observe the reference status indicators and confirm the "R" icons turn green before proceeding.

steps.title: Press RESET
steps.purpose: Initialize the referencing sequence from the HMI/operator controls.
steps.instruction: Press RESET on the HMI or operator controls.
steps.expected_result: The system accepts the reset input so the automatic referencing sequence can proceed.
steps.healthy_condition: RESET is pressed and the procedure can continue to AUTO REF.
steps.failure_condition: The system does not accept RESET or the procedure cannot proceed to automatic referencing.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Operator station HMI/operator controls associated with the referencing procedure context.

stop_or_escalate_if: RESET cannot be performed from the HMI/operator controls.
The system does not allow progression to AUTO REF after RESET.

source_evidence.text: Related nearby maintenance text on the same page includes automatic axis referencing steps using RESET, AUTO REF, green "R" icons to confirm referencing completion, AUTO, and CYCLE START.
Related nearby maintenance context also includes automatic axis referencing, RESET, AUTO REF, green 'R' icons, AUTO, and CYCLE START for restarting operation after referencing.

steps.title: Start automatic axis referencing
steps.purpose: Command the system to reference all tipper axes automatically.
steps.instruction: Press AUTO REF to reference all of the axes of the tippers.
steps.expected_result: The system begins automatically referencing all tipper axes.
steps.healthy_condition: Automatic referencing starts for all tipper axes.
steps.failure_condition: AUTO REF does not start the referencing process for all tipper axes.

actions.label: Press AUTO REF
actions.exact_action: Press AUTO REF to reference all of the axes of the tippers.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: HMI/operator station screen area used for axis referencing controls, including AUTO REF.
Nearby startup context mentioning homing axes using AUTO REF.

stop_or_escalate_if: AUTO REF is unavailable or does not initiate referencing.
Not all tipper axes appear to enter the referencing process.

source_evidence.text: Press AUTO REF to reference all of the axes of the tippers.
Related nearby maintenance text on the same page includes automatic axis referencing steps using RESET, AUTO REF, green "R" icons to confirm referencing completion, AUTO, and CYCLE START.
Nearby text ... homing axes Z1 and A1 for the left tipper and Z2 and A2 for the right tipper using AUTO REF.

steps.title: Verify referencing completion
steps.purpose: Confirm that automatic referencing has completed before returning the system to operation.
steps.instruction: Verify that the "R" icons turn green to confirm referencing is completed.
steps.expected_result: The reference status indicators show green "R" icons, confirming referencing is complete.
steps.failure_condition: The "R" icons do not turn green or referencing completion cannot be confirmed.

actions.label: Check green R icons
actions.exact_action: Verify that the 'R' icons turn green to confirm referencing is completed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Axis reference status indicators on the operator station HMI; confirm the 'R' icons are green.
Operator station HMI view associated with nearby axis referencing context; look for the reference status indicators and green 'R' icons.

stop_or_escalate_if: The "R" icons do not turn green.
Referencing completion cannot be visually confirmed on the HMI.
Do not continue to AUTO and CYCLE START until referencing is completed and the "R" icons have turned green.

source_evidence.text: Verify that the 'R' icons turn green to confirm referencing is completed. [Image support needed: HMI view showing the axis reference status indicators and the green 'R' icons.]

steps.title: Return the system to AUTO
steps.purpose: Place the system back into automatic mode after referencing is complete.
steps.instruction: When referencing is completed, press AUTO.
steps.expected_result: The system is returned to AUTO mode.
steps.healthy_condition: AUTO is selected only after referencing completion has been confirmed.
steps.failure_condition: AUTO cannot be selected, or AUTO is attempted before referencing completion is confirmed.

actions.label: Press AUTO
actions.exact_action: When referencing is completed, press AUTO.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Operator station controls associated with AUTO mode selection.
Operator station HMI/operator controls used to continue from referencing completion to AUTO.

stop_or_escalate_if: Referencing has not been confirmed complete by green "R" icons.
AUTO cannot be selected from the HMI/operator controls.

source_evidence.text: When referencing is completed, press AUTO.
Do not continue to AUTO and CYCLE START until referencing is completed and the 'R' icons have turned green.
Related nearby maintenance text on the same page includes automatic axis referencing steps using RESET, AUTO REF, green "R" icons to confirm referencing completion, AUTO, and CYCLE START.
Nearby text describes a recovery sequence at the operator station: press AUTO to enter automatic mode, press CYCLE START...

steps.title: Restart operation
steps.purpose: Resume operation after the system has been returned to AUTO mode.
steps.instruction: Press CYCLE START to restart operation.
steps.expected_result: Operation restarts after CYCLE START is pressed.
steps.healthy_condition: The system restarts operation after AUTO has been selected and referencing has completed.
steps.failure_condition: Operation does not restart after CYCLE START, or CYCLE START is attempted before referencing completion and AUTO mode are confirmed.

actions.label: Press CYCLE START
actions.exact_action: Press CYCLE START to restart operation.

Operator station HMI/operator controls used to restart operation after referencing.

stop_or_escalate_if: Referencing has not been confirmed complete by green "R" icons.
AUTO mode has not been selected.
CYCLE START does not restart operation.

source_evidence.text: Press CYCLE START to restart operation.
Do not continue to AUTO and CYCLE START until referencing is completed and the 'R' icons have turned green.

success_criteria: The system is returned to AUTO.
Operation restarts after CYCLE START is pressed.
healthy_conditions: The reference status indicators show green "R" icons.
The system accepts AUTO after referencing is complete.
Operation restarts after CYCLE START is pressed.
failure_conditions: The system does not accept RESET or AUTO REF.
The "R" icons do not turn green.
AUTO or CYCLE START cannot be performed successfully.
Operation does not restart after CYCLE START is pressed.
escalation_guidance: Stop and do not continue to AUTO or CYCLE START until referencing is completed and the "R" icons have turned green.
If referencing cannot be completed or confirmed, escalate for further maintenance review.
If any part has been replaced, follow the required re-commissioning process rather than relying only on this referencing procedure.
